title: (Bearish Signal) DEN, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling DEN's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 43 similar cases where DEN's MACD histogram became negative, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $41.11 is above $27.98 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/03/21 - 03/08/21, the price experienced a +22% Uptrend, while the week of 03/01/21 - 03/08/21 shows a -6% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/849vqrmqr1m61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=7a9bd3f60c855704b2207506315f54e6ba2eec73

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 43 of 51 cases where DEN's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 08, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on DEN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 74 of 88 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for DEN turned negative on March 08, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 43 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 38 of the 43 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 88%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where DEN declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 88%.

DEN broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 22, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9747542-reata-pharmaceuticals-inc-ordinary-shares-s-reta-117-96-price-exceeded-its-50-day-moving-average-on-march-08-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
